buildings.name: Cabin
buildings.desc: Sleeping quarters for 3 settlers. Warm at night.

buildings.name: Meeting Hall
buildings.desc: Recreation and society. Settlers gather here off-shift.

buildings.name: Hearth
buildings.desc: An open stone fire. Warms everyone within a few tiles — winter's answer.

buildings.name: Clothes Maker
buildings.desc: Weaves flax and straw into warm clothing (2 grain per set).

buildings.name: Burial Ground
buildings.desc: A fenced plot with simple rites. The dead rest here — and the living rest easier.
